blocks.description: Program header (analytics pipeline v3.1, Advanced Analytics Team — Customer Intelligence Division, change log v1.0-v3.1 by R. Nguyen/M. Torres/J. Kim), Section 1 header; OPTIONS for macro debugging (mprint mlogic symbolgen nocenter ls=200 ps=65 validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i); LIBNAME for raw (input, readonly), features (feature store), mdllib (model repository), output (deliverables); global %LET for model_version=v3.1, model_target=churn_flag, analysis_date via %SYSFUNC(TODAY), lookback_months=12, score_threshold=0.5, n_deciles=10, min_obs=100, train_pct=70, valid_pct=30, random_seed=20260219, pipeline_rc=0, step_count=0; feature window specs window_1m=30, window_3m=90, window_6m=180, window_12m=365

%MACRO extract_population(as_of_date=) opening: documentation header for analysis population extraction with sufficient history for churn modeling; %LOCAL n_active n_eligible; %PUT banner with as_of_date and lookback_months

PROC SQL NOPRINT inside extract_population: CREATE TABLE work.active_customers from raw.customers c INNER JOIN raw.transactions t ON customer_id, WHERE transaction_date >= INTNX('month', as_of_date, -lookback_months) AND status='ACTIVE' AND enrollment_date < INTNX(-3 months), GROUP BY customer_id/enrollment_date/segment_code/region/product_tier/tenure_months, HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT transaction_id) >= 2; SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_active TRIMMED for population count; %PUT n_active

DATA work.population inside extract_population with KEEP= clause (customer_id, enrollment_date, segment_code, region, product_tier, tenure_months, last_activity_date, txn_count, total_spend, cohort, age_band); SET work.active_customers; LENGTH cohort $15 age_band $10; tenure-based cohort assignment (NEW <6mo, ESTABLISHED <24mo, MATURE <60mo, LEGACY); age band derivation via INTCK('year') from enrollment (18-24, 25-34, 35-44, 45-54, 55+); outlier exclusion filter total_spend > 0 AND txn_count <= 5000

Eligibility validation inside extract_population: PROC SQL NOPRINT SELECT COUNT(*) INTO :n_eligible from work.population; %PUT n_eligible; %IF n_eligible < min_obs: %PUT ERROR population too small, sets pipeline_rc=1; %MEND extract_population

%MACRO build_features(feature_group=) opening: documentation header for feature engineering by domain group (DEMOGRAPHIC, BEHAVIORAL, FINANCIAL, ENGAGEMENT); %LOCAL i n_windows; %PUT banner with feature_group

%IF &feature_group=DEMOGRAPHIC inside build_features: DATA work.feat_demographic with KEEP= (customer_id, age_bin, tenure_band, geo_region, urban_flag, hh_size_cat); SET work.population; LENGTH age_bin $12 tenure_band $15 geo_region $20; age binning (YOUNG/MIDDLE/SENIOR from age_band); tenure banding (UNDER_1YR <12mo, 1_TO_3YR <36mo, 3_TO_6YR <72mo, OVER_6YR); SELECT(region) geographic consolidation (NORTHEAST/SOUTHEAST/MIDWEST/SOUTHWEST/WEST/OTHER); urban_flag boolean; hh_size_cat via RANUNI proxy

%ELSE %IF &feature_group=BEHAVIORAL inside build_features: PROC SORT raw.transactions BY customer_id transaction_date OUT=work._txn_sorted; DATA work.feat_behavioral with KEEP= (customer_id, avg_days_between, recency_days, frequency_score, intensity_trend, peak_month, session_regularity, channel_diversity); SET work._txn_sorted BY customer_id; RETAIN cum_gap_days cum_txn_count prev_amount cum_channels 0; LAG(transaction_date) and LAG(amount) for trend tracking; FIRST.customer_id reset accumulators; cumulative gap days and transaction count; channel bitmask via BOR for WEB(1)/MOBILE(2)/STORE(4)/PHONE(8); LAST.customer_id computes avg_days_between, recency_days via INTCK, frequency_score via LOG, intensity_trend ratio, peak_month, session_regularity, channel_diversity count via BAND

%ELSE %IF &feature_group=FINANCIAL inside build_features: PROC SQL CREATE TABLE work.feat_financial from work.population p LEFT JOIN raw.transactions t; revenue metrics (total_revenue, avg_txn_amount, max_txn_amount, std_txn_amount); payment history (late_payment_count, missed_payment_count, late_payment_rate via CALCULATED/MAX); arrearage indicators (total_arrearage via CASE WHEN balance_due > 0, max_days_overdue via INTCK from due_date); spending trajectory (spend_trend_ratio comparing last 3 months vs prior via NULLIFN)

%ELSE %IF &feature_group=ENGAGEMENT inside build_features: DATA work.feat_engagement with KEEP= (customer_id, email_score, web_score, app_score, call_score, total_engagement_score, preferred_channel, engagement_trend, multi_channel_flag); SET work.population; ARRAY ch_raw{4} for raw counts, ARRAY ch_wt{4} _TEMPORARY_ (0.2 0.3 0.35 0.15) weights, ARRAY ch_score{4} for weighted scores, ARRAY ch_name{4} $8 channel names; _seed derivation from customer_id; DO j=1 TO 4 simulate interaction counts; DO k=1 TO 4 compute weighted scores with ROUND, track preferred_channel via max; DO m=1 TO 4 multi_channel_flag (3+ channels with count > 5); engagement_trend indicator (+1/0/-1 thresholds)

Time-window aggregation loop inside build_features: %LET n_windows=4; %DO i=1 %TO &n_windows: %LET _window via %SCAN over window_1m/3m/6m/12m; %PUT window diagnostics; PROC SQL NOPRINT CREATE TABLE work._window_&i._&feature_group from work.population p LEFT JOIN raw.transactions t WHERE transaction_date >= INTNX('day', analysis_date, -&_window); SELECT customer_id, window_days, txn_count_w&i, spend_w&i via COALESCE(SUM), avg_spend_w&i via COALESCE(AVG), GROUP BY customer_id; %END; %MEND build_features

%MACRO train_model(method=, target=) opening: documentation header for churn model training via LOGISTIC or TREE method with variable importance and coefficient capture; %LOCAL n_vars; %PUT banner with method, target, model_version

PROC SQL inside train_model: CREATE TABLE work.train_data joining work.population p with work.feat_demographic d, work.feat_behavioral b, work.feat_financial f, work.feat_engagement e all via LEFT JOIN ON customer_id; SELECT includes target variable, demographic features (age_bin, tenure_band, geo_region, urban_flag), behavioral features (avg_days_between, recency_days, frequency_score, intensity_trend, channel_diversity), financial features (total_revenue, avg_txn_amount, late_payment_rate, total_arrearage, max_days_overdue, spend_trend_ratio), engagement features (total_engagement_score, preferred_channel, engagement_trend, multi_channel_flag)

DATA work.train_set work.valid_set inside train_model: SET work.train_data; IF RANUNI(random_seed) <= train_pct/100 THEN OUTPUT work.train_set ELSE OUTPUT work.valid_set for training/validation partition

%IF &method=LOGISTIC inside train_model: ODS OUTPUT ParameterEstimates=work.model_coefficients, Association=work.model_association, FitStatistics=work.model_fit; PROC LOGISTIC DATA=work.train_set DESCENDING with CLASS age_bin tenure_band geo_region preferred_channel /PARAM=REF; MODEL target(EVENT='1') with stepwise selection (SLENTRY=0.05 SLSTAY=0.10), LACKFIT RSQUARE STB CORRB; OUTPUT OUT=work.train_scored P=pred_prob; SCORE DATA=work.valid_set OUT=work.valid_scored; ODS OUTPUT CLOSE; DATA _null_ SET model_association extracting c-statistic via CALL SYMPUTX where Label2='c'; %PUT c_statistic

%ELSE %IF &method=TREE inside train_model: PROC HPSPLIT DATA=work.train_set MAXDEPTH=6 MAXBRANCH=2; CLASS for categorical variables + target; MODEL target with all numeric and categorical predictors; GROW ENTROPY; PRUNE COSTCOMPLEXITY; OUTPUT OUT=work.train_scored; CODE FILE for generated scoring code; DATA work.valid_scored with %INCLUDE of tree_score_code.sas to score validation set; %PUT training complete

PROC MEANS inside train_model: DATA=work.train_scored NOPRINT NWAY; CLASS target; VAR avg_days_between recency_days frequency_score total_revenue avg_txn_amount late_payment_rate total_engagement_score; OUTPUT OUT=work.var_importance MEAN= /AUTONAME for variable importance ranking

DATA mdllib.model_registry inside train_model: LENGTH model_id $30 model_method $20 model_version $10 target_var $32; FORMAT training_date YYMMDD10.; assigns model_id='CHURN_&model_version', model_method, model_version, training_date from analysis_date, target_var, n_predictors=14; OUTPUT; %MEND train_model

%MACRO score_population(model_ds=) opening: documentation header for model scoring with Platt scaling calibration, risk decile assignment, KS statistic and Gini coefficient computation; %LOCAL ks_stat gini_coeff max_ks_decile; %PUT banner with model_ds

DATA work.scored_raw inside score_population with KEEP= (customer_id, raw_score, pred_prob): SET work.train_data; DECLARE HASH h_coef(DATASET: model_ds) with DEFINEKEY('Variable') DEFINEDATA('Estimate') DEFINEDONE(); LENGTH Variable $32; retrieves Intercept estimate via h_coef.FIND(); accumulates raw_score from numeric predictor coefficients (avg_days_between*0.012, recency_days*0.025, frequency_score*-0.18, total_revenue*-0.0001, late_payment_rate*0.45, total_engagement_score*-0.09); pred_prob via inverse logit 1/(1+EXP(-raw_score))

DATA work.scored_calibrated inside score_population: SET work.scored_raw; Platt scaling calibration with _platt_a=-1.2 and _platt_b=0.8; calibrated_prob = 1/(1+EXP(-(_platt_a + _platt_b * raw_score))); predicted_churn binary flag via calibrated_prob >= score_threshold
PROC RANK inside score_population: DATA=work.scored_calibrated OUT=work.scored_deciled GROUPS=n_deciles DESCENDING; VAR calibrated_prob; RANKS risk_decile for decile assignment
DATA work.scored_deciled inside score_population: SET work.scored_deciled; risk_decile = risk_decile + 1 for 1-based decile indexing adjustment

PROC MEANS inside score_population: DATA=work.scored_deciled NOPRINT NWAY; CLASS risk_decile; VAR predicted_churn calibrated_prob; OUTPUT OUT=work.decile_stats SUM(predicted_churn)=churn_count N=total_count MEAN(calibrated_prob)=avg_prob for per-decile performance statistics

DATA work.ks_gini_calc inside score_population: SET work.decile_stats END=last; RETAIN cum_events cum_non_events total_events total_non_events 0; initializes total_events=500, total_non_events=4500; cumulative event/non-event rate computation; ks_value = ABS(event_rate - non_event_rate); on LAST observation: CALL SYMPUTX for ks_stat via MAX(ks_value) and gini_coeff via 2*AUC-1 approximation; %PUT KS and Gini diagnostics; %MEND score_population
%MACRO generate_outputs opening: documentation header for business deliverables including performance summary, scored customer list, lift chart dataset, and decile distribution report; %PUT banner

PROC SQL inside generate_outputs: CREATE TABLE output.model_performance from work.scored_deciled; SELECT model_version, run_date with format YYMMDD10., COUNT(*) as population_size, SUM(predicted_churn) as predicted_churners, AVG/MIN/MAX(calibrated_prob) as probability stats with FORMAT 8.4, ks_statistic, gini_coefficient from macro variables

DATA output.scored_customers inside generate_outputs with KEEP= (customer_id, cohort, segment_code, calibrated_prob, risk_decile, risk_band, predicted_churn, retention_priority): SET work.scored_deciled; LENGTH risk_band $12 retention_priority $10; risk band assignment (VERY_HIGH decile<=2, HIGH <=4, MEDIUM <=6, LOW <=8, VERY_LOW); retention priority logic combining risk band and total_revenue threshold (CRITICAL for high-risk + revenue>1000, HIGH for high-risk, MONITOR for medium, STANDARD otherwise)

PROC SQL inside generate_outputs: CREATE TABLE output.lift_chart_data from work.scored_deciled GROUP BY risk_decile; SELECT risk_decile, n_customers, actual_churners, model_prob, actual_churn_rate via CALCULATED with PERCENT8.2 format, baseline_rate via scalar subquery AVG(predicted_churn), lift = actual_churn_rate / baseline_rate for PROC SGPLOT visualization

PROC FREQ inside generate_outputs: DATA=work.scored_deciled; TABLES risk_decile * predicted_churn / NOCUM NOPERCENT for decile distribution cross-tabulation; TITLE1 with model_version, TITLE2 with analysis_date; TITLE reset; %MEND generate_outputs
Section 3 header comment (Main Program Execution — Orchestrate Pipeline Steps) and %PUT execution banner with CUSTOMER CHURN PREDICTION PIPELINE title, model_version, analysis_date
Step 1: %LET step_count increment; %PUT step banner; %extract_population(as_of_date=&analysis_date) invocation to define analysis population; %IF &pipeline_rc > 0 error abort with %GOTO pipeline_end

Step 2: %LET step_count increment; %PUT step banner; four sequential %build_features invocations for feature_group=DEMOGRAPHIC, BEHAVIORAL, FINANCIAL, ENGAGEMENT; %IF &syserr > 4 error check with pipeline_rc=2 and %GOTO pipeline_end

Step 3: %LET step_count increment; %PUT step banner; PROC SQL CREATE TABLE work.model_ready joining work.population p with work.feat_demographic d, work.feat_behavioral b, work.feat_financial f, work.feat_engagement e via LEFT JOIN ON customer_id; SELECT p.*, all feature columns from each domain; %IF &syserr > 4 error check with pipeline_rc=3 and %GOTO pipeline_end

Step 4: %LET step_count increment; %PUT step banner; %train_model(method=LOGISTIC, target=&model_target) invocation for logistic regression churn model training; %IF &pipeline_rc > 0 error abort with %GOTO pipeline_end

Step 5: %LET step_count increment; %PUT step banner; %score_population(model_ds=work.model_coefficients) invocation to apply model to full population with Platt calibration and decile assignment; %IF &pipeline_rc > 0 error abort with %GOTO pipeline_end

Step 6: %LET step_count increment; %PUT step banner; %generate_outputs invocation to create performance summary, scored customer list, lift chart data, and decile report; %IF &syserr > 4 error check with pipeline_rc=4 and %GOTO pipeline_end

%pipeline_end label; PROC DATASETS LIB=work NOLIST NOWARN; DELETE _txn_sorted _window_: active_customers train_set valid_set train_data train_scored valid_scored scored_raw scored_calibrated decile_stats ks_gini_calc var_importance model_association model_fit for temporary dataset cleanup; QUIT

OPTIONS NOMPRINT NOMLOGIC NOSYMBOLGEN reset to defaults; final %PUT completion banner with PIPELINE COMPLETE, Final Status via %SYSFUNC(IFC(pipeline_rc=0, SUCCESS, FAILED)), Steps Executed, Model Version, Analysis Date
